Vasant Panchami / Saraswati Puja; Naga Panchami; Lalita Panchami
Ram Navami (pan-Hindu); Maha Navami (Sharad Navaratri); Sita Navami (cross-stream)

Narasimha Jayanti (Shukla Chaturdashi Vaishakha); Maha Shivratri (pan-Hindu); Masik Shivratri (every Krishna Chaturdashi, systemic)

Buddha Purnima / Vaishakha Purnima (pan-Hindu); Kurma Jayanti (Vaishakha Purnima); Hanuman Jayanti (Chaitra Purnima, cross-stream); Tripurari Purnima / Kartik Purnima; Mahalaya Amavasya / Pitr Paksha; Sharad Purnima / Kojagari Lakshmi (cross-stream)
